title: paeonia officinalis subsp. microcarpa
intro: Paeonia officinalis subsp. microcarpa, also known as the Small-flowered Paeony, is a plant species within the genus Paeonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis subsp. microcarpa include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as a reduction in inflammation and pain. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
